title: Why Airplanes Are Not Just Flying Machines

segments.text: Airplanes are marvels of engineering and physics.
They rely on four forces to stay airborne.
Lift, weight, thrust, and drag work together.
Each factor plays a crucial role in flying.
Without one, the flight would be impossible.
It's a perfect blend of science and technology.
Understanding these forces can give you new appreciation.
Follow Curio for your daily dose of science.

description: Airplanes are a blend of physics and engineering! Follow for daily science & tech! ✈️
